properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God is on the throne He reigns forevermore Just think about it Just think about it, yeah

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Why should I worry? Why should I fear? Why should I run When Jesus is here? I'm safe in His arms Safe in His heart And nothing can take me away from His love.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Why should I worry? Why should I fear? Why should I run When Jesus is here? I'm safe in His arms Safe in His heart And nothing can take me away

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: God is on the throne He reigns forevermore Just think about it Just think about itGod is always good He loves like a father should Just think about it Just think about it

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: When I am anxious, when I'm afraid I find the strength when I call on His Name I'm safe in His arms, safe in His heart (safe, safe) And nothing can take me away

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: He's the King of power, King of kings He is the Lord over everything To Him be the glory, the honor and praise Forever and ever, amen always God is on the throne (God on the throne) He reigns forevermore Just think about it Just think about it

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: God is always good (God always good) He loves like a father should Just think about it Just think about it Just think about it Just think about it

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Hallelujah, He reigns Hallelujah, He saves (oh I know) Hallelujah, always (always) He's never gonna let me down (He's never gonna let me down) Hallelujah, He reigns Hallelujah, He saves Hallelujah, always He's never gonna let me down

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: God is on the throne (on the throne) He reigns forevermore (forever) Just think about it Just think about it God is always good (God is always good) He loves like a father should (He loves like a father should) Just think about it (think about it) Just think about it

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Ohh, I bow on my knees I bow down before the King of kings, mmm And nothing can separate us from the Love of God No mountain or valley
